'''bovabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarish|vulgarish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarish|vulgarish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bovabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovabithi|bovabithi]] || [[word:bovabiji|bovabiji]] || [[word:bovabishi|bovabishi]] || [[word:bovabiki|bovabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovabuthuthu|bovabuthuthu]] || [[word:bovabujuju|bovabujuju]] || [[word:bovabushushu|bovabushushu]] || [[word:bovabukuku|bovabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovabuthu|bovabuthu]] || [[word:bovabuju|bovabuju]] || [[word:bovabushu|bovabushu]] || [[word:bovabuku|bovabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovabufthuf|bovabufthuf]] || [[word:bovabufjuf|bovabufjuf]] || [[word:bovabufshuf|bovabufshuf]] || [[word:bovabufkuf|bovabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovabethe|bovabethe]] || [[word:bovabeje|bovabeje]] || [[word:bovabeshe|bovabeshe]] || [[word:bovabeke|bovabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovabothotho|bovabothotho]] || [[word:bovabojojo|bovabojojo]] || [[word:bovaboshosho|bovaboshosho]] || [[word:bovabokoko|bovabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovabotho|bovabotho]] || [[word:bovabojo|bovabojo]] || [[word:bovabosho|bovabosho]] || [[word:bovaboko|bovaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovabofthof|bovabofthof]] || [[word:bovabofjof|bovabofjof]] || [[word:bovabofshof|bovabofshof]] || [[word:bovabofkof|bovabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfthÃŸf|bovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfjÃŸf|bovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfshÃŸf|bovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfkÃŸf|bovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bovabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bovabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bovabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bovabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfthÃŸf|bovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfjÃŸf|bovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfshÃŸf|bovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfkÃŸf|bovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfthÃŸf|bovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfjÃŸf|bovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfshÃŸf|bovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovabÃŸfkÃŸf|bovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovabÃḊthÃḊ|bovabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bovabÃḊjÃḊ|bovabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bovabÃḊshÃḊ|bovabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bovabÃḊkÃḊ|bovabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovabathatha|bovabathatha]] || [[word:bovabajaja|bovabajaja]] || [[word:bovabashasha|bovabashasha]] || [[word:bovabakaka|bovabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovabatha|bovabatha]] || [[word:bovabaja|bovabaja]] || [[word:bovabasha|bovabasha]] || [[word:bovabaka|bovabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovabafthaf|bovabafthaf]] || [[word:bovabafjaf|bovabafjaf]] || [[word:bovabafshaf|bovabafshaf]] || [[word:bovabafkaf|bovabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bovabasha|bovabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovabshÃḋsha|bovabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovabrosha|bovabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovabmusha|bovabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovabyasha|bovabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovabnkshÃḋsha|gobovabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovabnkrosha|gobovabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovabnkmusha|gobovabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovabnkyasha|gobovabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bovavabasha|bovavabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovavabshÃḋsha|bovavabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovavabrosha|bovavabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovavabmusha|bovavabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovavabyasha|bovavabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovavabnkshÃḋsha|gobovavabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovavabnkrosha|gobovavabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovavabnkmusha|gobovavabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovavabnkyasha|gobovavabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bevÃḊbasha|bevÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bevÃḊbshÃḋsha|bevÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bevÃḊbrosha|bevÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bevÃḊbmusha|bevÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bevÃḊbyasha|bevÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gobevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobevÃḊbnkrosha|gobevÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobevÃḊbnkmusha|gobevÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobevÃḊbnkyasha|gobevÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bovfabasha|bovfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovfabshÃḋsha|bovfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovfabrosha|bovfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovfabmusha|bovfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovfabyasha|bovfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovfabnkshÃḋsha|gobovfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovfabnkrosha|gobovfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovfabnkmusha|gobovfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovfabnkyasha|gobovfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
